The story of Ganapathy narrates the divine birth of Lord Vinayagar and how he came to have an elephant’s face. Goddess Parvati created Pillaiyar from her body paste to guard her, but an enraged Shiva severed his head when Pillaiyar stopped him. To restore him, Shiva placed the head of a northern elephant on Pillaiyar, transforming him into Vinayagar. This tale is celebrated across many mythological traditions.
